The '''''Imperial Destiny''''' was [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

She served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]]'s [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It came out of the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] with little damage, as its position at the front of the battle line actually caused it to be the farthest [[Starship/Legends|ship]] from an enemy flanking attack.

{{Ship-stub}}
